questions.question: What does the FairLottery contract inherit from?
The closeLotteryAndRequestRandomness() function must be payable because requesting randomness requires prepaying for callback gas.
What percentage is the HOUSE_FEE_PERCENT in the FairLottery contract?
The onRandomnessReceived() function must be marked as ______ override.
How does the contract select the winner from the players array?
options: First player in the array always wins
Converts randomness to uint256, uses modulo to get index within array bounds
Organizer manually selects from the array
questions.correctAnswer: Converts randomness to uint256, uses modulo to get index within array bounds

questions.question: The cancelAndRefund() function allows players to get refunds if randomness doesn't arrive within the TIMEOUT period.
